title: Schematic Market
description: A marketplace mod where players can buy and place pre-made constructions using an in-game economy system.
body:
# Schematic Market

Transform your Minecraft server with an integrated construction marketplace! Players can browse, purchase, and instantly place beautiful pre-made structures.

## ✨ Features

- **📚 Construction Catalog**: Browse available constructions with thumbnails and details
- **💎 Economy Integration**: Purchase constructions using emeralds (customizable currency)
- **🔄 Rotation Support**: Place structures in any of 4 directions (0°, 90°, 180°, 270°)
- **🏗️ Instant Placement**: Right-click to place your purchased construction
- **📦 Multiple Formats**: Supports both .schem and .schematic files
- **⚙️ Server-Friendly**: Add custom constructions without updating the mod

## 🎮 How to Use

1. Press **C** to open the Construction Catalog
2. Browse available constructions
3. Click on a construction to view details
4. Select rotation and click **BUY**
5. Right-click on a block to place the construction

## 🎯 Economy Commands
```
/balance - Check your balance
/balance add <player> <amount> - Add currency
/balance remove <player> <amount> - Remove currency
/balance set <player> <amount> - Set balance
```

## 📋 Requirements

- Minecraft 1.20.1
- Fabric API
- Fabric Loader

## 🐛 Known Issues

- Some complex block states might not preserve perfectly
- Large constructions (1000+ blocks) may cause brief lag on placement

## 📝 License

MIT License - Feel free to use in your modpacks!

## 💬 Support

Found a bug? Have a suggestion? Open an issue on GitHub!
